items.title: More women like Celine are being diagnosed with ADHD. We're not sure why

items.title: Turtles buried under mud at NSW wetlands after water inflows halted

children.content: Researchers in north-west NSW are wading through thick mud in an attempt to save hundreds of turtles after the NSW government decided to stop supplying water to the protected wetland.
Conservation biologists say the Gingham Waterhole in the Gwydir Wetlands near Moree is facing an "ecological disaster".

image.altText: Two people pull a turtle out of mud and bag it up

gallery.altText: Image shows turtles in container covered in mud.

thumbnail.altText: Image shows turtles in container covered in mud.
